title: Actionable validation error messages
description:
Make validation findings actionable enough that an agent can self-correct from the message alone, without reading the ruleset or docs.

## Background

When section items fail to parse (prose without bullets), the json-schema rule emits `[] has less than 1 item` and `None of [] are valid under the given schema` with no field context. Regex feedback renders raw tab and zero-width characters. A typo'd heading surfaces only as a missing-property error.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] An empty section projection produces a message naming the section heading and stating that items must be Markdown bullets
- [ ] json-schema findings include the instance path of the failing field
- [ ] Character classes in regex feedback render readably (`\s` or a word, never raw control characters)
- [ ] `require-section` emits a did-you-mean hint when a heading is a near-miss of the required one (e.g. `Sucess Criteria`)
- [ ] The steering loop on the sloppy-epic scenario reaches a valid write in at most 2 iterations using only error text
